user.title: Connect to ezloPi
user.description: Please enter the username and password for your Ezlo account.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with ezloPi
reauth_confirm.description: The credentials for {username} are no longer valid. Please enter the password again.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure ezloPi
reconfigure.description: Update the Ezlo account credentials for this entry.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Ezlo cloud.

abort.account_mismatch: The credentials are for a different Ezlo account than this entry.

command_failed.message: Failed to send the command to {name}.

hub_unreachable.title: ezloPi hub {serial} is unreachable
hub_unreachable.description: Home Assistant can't reach ezloPi hub {serial} on the local network. Check that the hub is powered on, connected to the same network as Home Assistant, and discoverable via mDNS (_ezlo._tcp). The hub will reconnect automatically once reachable.
